steps.title: Compare glacier areas
steps.content: The graph shows the Gorner glacier at about 41 square kilometers, the Fiescher glacier at about 29 square kilometers, and the Unteraar glacier at about 22 square kilometers.

steps.title: Rank the glaciers
steps.content: Choice B says Gorner is smaller than Fiescher. Choice C says Gorner is smaller than both. Choice D says Gorner is smaller than Unteraar. The remaining comparison correctly says Gorner has a larger area than both glaciers. The answer is A.
